consumer_classifications.description: P247C reconciliation script. Opens DB read-only, queries view directly.
P247B tests. Validates view row count, raw count, integrity. Both JSON artifact and live DB assertions use view.
P247C tests. Queries view and validates all post-apply counts.
BacktestEngine.backtest() uses db.get_canonical_draws(lottery_type). This is the primary research/strategy backtesting backbone. Functionally equivalent to the view (returns 2,113 for BIG_LOTTO).
RSM strategy monitor bootstrap uses db.get_canonical_draws(). Correctly excludes all non-canonical rows.
Unified prediction entry point uses db.get_canonical_draws(). Production prediction pipeline correctly canonical.
P246K NIST re-audit uses db.get_canonical_draws('BIG_LOTTO'). Research path is correctly canonical.
RSM engine (P246F/G migrated). Already uses get_canonical_draws(). No view adoption needed — helper is semantically equivalent.
API prediction routes use get_all_draws() to build draw history for strategy context. Includes all lottery types. Raw access intentional — display/history paths must remain raw.
History display API endpoint. Must expose all BIG_LOTTO rows including ADD_ON_PRIZE_EXCLUDED for complete historical record.
Common history loader used by display/API paths. Intentionally raw — serves all row families.

get_canonical_draws() for BIG_LOTTO currently applies SQL filter (hyphen + date-format) then Python-level SMALL_POOL_ALIEN filter. Could be updated to query draws_big_lotto_canonical_main VIEW internally — eliminating Python-level filter, single source of truth. Requires database.py change authorization. Both produce identical 2,113 rows; no behavioral change for callers.
BIG_LOTTO analysis tool using get_all_draws(). Research script; could adopt get_canonical_draws() or view. Requires dedicated scope and test coverage update.
BIG_LOTTO analysis tool using get_all_draws(). Research script; exploratory analysis. Future scope.
BIG_LOTTO special-draw analysis using get_all_draws(). Exploratory; not in active prediction pipeline. Future scope.
BIG_LOTTO market temperature analysis using get_all_draws(). Exploratory research tool. Future scope.
BIG_LOTTO top-N analysis using get_all_draws(). Exploratory research tool. Future scope.
BIG_LOTTO audit scripts (audit_big_lotto_3bet, baseline, hyper, rigorous). Use get_all_draws(). Require canonical adoption to ensure audits run only on canonical 2,113 rows. Future scope.
Backtest scripts targeting POWER_LOTTO or DAILY_539 only. BIG_LOTTO canonical view does not apply.
Archived one-off predict scripts (predict_biglotto_8_bets.py etc). Not in active production pipeline. No adoption needed.
Post-draw automation pipeline. Does not query draw rows directly for research; delegates to canonical helpers.

phase_1_immediate.description: P247D audit complete. No code changes required now.
items: Verify view is canonical source via read-only reconciliation (P247C done)

phase_2_database_py.description: Update get_canonical_draws() to query view internally.
items: Replace SQL+Python dual-filter in database.py with: SELECT * FROM draws_big_lotto_canonical_main ORDER BY CAST(draw AS INTEGER) DESC [LIMIT N]
This eliminates the Python-level SMALL_POOL_ALIEN filter
All callers automatically benefit without code change
Result remains 2,113 rows — no behavioral change for callers
phase_2_database_py.authorization_required: FUTURE_SCOPE — database.py change not in P247D whitelist
phase_2_database_py.risk: LOW — idempotent, same output count, improves consistency

phase_3_analysis_tools.description: Update BIG_LOTTO analysis tools to use get_canonical_draws().
phase_3_analysis_tools.authorization_required: FUTURE_SCOPE — broad tool refactor, needs dedicated scope
phase_3_analysis_tools.risk: MEDIUM — each tool may behave differently with canonical-only rows

not_recommended: Changing raw history/display API paths (must remain raw for full record)
Changing callers that already use get_canonical_draws() (no benefit)
Broad P246 test updates (already clean after P246F/G migration)

future_scope_items: Phase 2: Update database.py get_canonical_draws() to query view internally (eliminates Python-level SMALL_POOL_ALIEN filter, single source of truth)
Phase 3: Update BIG_LOTTO analysis tools from get_all_draws() to get_canonical_draws() (6 tools + audit group)
Annotation table (draw_row_family_annotations): remains deferred, requires separate Type D authorization
final_decision: P247D consumer adoption audit complete. View draws_big_lotto_canonical_main confirmed: 2113 canonical rows, 22238 raw BIG_LOTTO rows preserved. 3 paths ALREADY_VIEW_BACKED, 4 ALREADY_HELPER_CANONICAL (equivalent), 1 SHOULD_KEEP_HELPER, 3 RAW_HISTORY_ALLOWED (must remain raw), 6+ FUTURE_SCOPE_REQUIRES_AUTHORIZATION. No DB write performed. No rows deleted/updated/inserted. Add-on records preserved and raw-accessible. Annotation table remains deferred (future Type D).
